rationale: The module title 'elementary abelian of exponent two' conflicts with the body's own statement that the (ℤ/2)ⁿ identification is deferred to a later step — the body uses 'exponent-two and abelian' as the scope, making the title internally inconsistent. Review 2 correctly identifies this real inconsistency at line 10 vs. lines 17-19; Review 1 misses it entirely.
